channel.title: Wxt on Drupal WxT
channel.description: Recent content in Wxt on Drupal WxT

item.title: Repositories for Drupal WxT
item.description: The following table is a list of all the repositories that are housed under the DrupalWxT organization on GitHub. Name Website Description Size composer-extdeps drupalwxt/composer-extdeps Composer repository for external dependencies on Drupal WxT Size: 24 Bytes docker-scaffold drupalwxt/docker-scaffold Docker Scaffold for Drupal WxT Size: 61 Bytes drupalwxt.github.io drupalwxt/drupalwxt.github.io GH pages for Drupal WxT. Size: 11355 Bytes helm-drupal drupalwxt/helm-drupal Drupal helm chart for Kubernetes.

item.title: Releases
item.description: Important We try our best to have security releases of Drupal Core within 24-72 hours of being made available on drupal.org. The following table is a list of all the releases that are housed under the DrupalWxT organization on GitHub. Release Created Date Description 3.0.19 2021-02-01T00:22:48Z Features/Updates: Update Drupal Core to 8.9.13 SA-core-2021-001 Upgrade path: Update your codebase:
